cards.front: Tea Brewing Guide (Long Multiline Scroll & Scaling Test)
cards.back:
● Heat fresh, cold water to the appropriate temperature:
  ○ Green tea: 75°C–80°C (167°F–176°F)
  ○ Black tea / Herbal tea: 90°C–95°C (194°F–203°F)
● Place 1-2 teaspoons of loose tea leaves in your teapot or infuser.
● Pour the hot water over the tea leaves.
  * Note: Do not pour boiling water directly on delicate green teas to avoid bitterness!
● Steep for the recommended duration:
  ○ Green tea: 2 to 3 minutes
  ○ Black tea: 3 to 5 minutes
  ○ Herbal tea: 5 to 10 minutes
● Remove the infuser or strain the tea leaves immediately. Repeat with sweeteners or milk as desired.

(This text is long, so it should trigger the 1.25rem font scaling, align to the left for clean readability, and scroll smoothly from the very first line without being cut off by the 'Answer' header)
